name: model-combo
description: Subscription-native orchestration for AI coding CLIs.

interface.shortDescription: One gated coding pipeline across subscription CLIs
interface.longDescription: A zero-project-config, fail-closed Codex plugin that coordinates official subscription-authenticated coding CLIs, keeps private run state outside target worktrees, binds Fable approval to an exact plan hash, dispatches Grok Build only after approval, and requires independent Codex verification.
capabilities: Private run state outside project worktrees
defaultPrompt: Use $model-combo to implement this feature through the full gated workflow.
Use $model-combo to check provider readiness without executing anything.
Use $model-combo to resume the approved Grok execution and verify the result.
